scope.target: Create the first Codex runtime skill wrapper pilot
scope.dependency_radius: .codex/skills, canonical skill source, human-facing guide, existing Claude wrapper
constraints: Keep the Codex runtime wrapper thin
Do not duplicate the full canonical references

inputs.architecture_target: Validate that a portable canonical skill can map into a Codex runtime skill wrapper
user_constraints: Proceed with a runtime-skill pilot rather than only prompt wrappers

steps: Created a Codex runtime SKILL.md wrapper for ddd-ca-hex-architect
Created thin-pointer reference files under the runtime wrapper
Updated the canonical skill metadata to record Codex runtime wrapper mapping
validation: The Codex runtime wrapper points back to the canonical skill source
The runtime wrapper stays separate from the existing prompt wrapper
The runtime wrapper does not duplicate the full canonical references
deferred_items: Decide whether to export or sync runtime wrappers automatically

results.summary: Created the first Codex runtime skill wrapper pilot for ddd-ca-hex-architect.
